const{error:uploadError}=await supabase.storage.from('avatars').upload(filePath,file);if(uploadError)throw uploadError;// Get public URL

const{error:updateError}=await supabase.from('user_profiles').update({avatar_url:publicUrl}).eq('id',user.id);if(updateError)throw updateError;setAvatarUrl(publicUrl);}catch(error){console.error('Error uploading avatar:',error);alert('Error uploading avatar!');}finally{setUploading(false);}};// Fetch avatar on component mount and when user changes
